subcodes.first_line: O Solomon! Strive thou, that in these days of the Peerless Friend, thou mayest attain unto such a station as shall be recorded by the Pen in the Book of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیمان جهد نما تا در ایام دوست یکتا بمقامی فائز شوی که ذکرش در کتاب اسما از قلم
subcodes.subjects: @Greatest Name, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for teaching
